_comment: Ordered backlog for the anki-voice autonomy supervisor. Tasks run top-to-bottom. Each has an id, title, and a spec markdown file under autonomy/tasks/. Edit/append here to give the bot more work; the supervisor picks up new pending tasks on its next idle poll.

tasks.title: ReviewSession hands-free state machine (pure Kotlin) + unit tests
Start hands-free review button in MainActivity wiring ReviewSession
Voice command vocabulary (grade / repeat / answer), keyword-match first
LLM-based voice-command intent classification (Claude Haiku), keyword-first
Repeat the equation: re-read only the math portion(s) of the card
